name: FlashMemory-DeepSeek-V4: Lightning Index Ultra-Long Context via Lookahead Sparse Attention
summary: arXiv:2606.09079v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Conventional LLMs keep the full KV cache loaded during decoding, causing a severe GPU memory bottleneck for ultra-long context serving. In...
description: arXiv:2606.09079v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Conventional LLMs keep the full KV cache loaded during decoding, causing a severe GPU memory bottleneck for ultra-long context serving. In this report, we propose \textbf{Lookahead Sparse Attention (LSA)}, a novel inference paradigm powered by a Neural Memory Indexer built upon the DeepSeek-V4 architecture. Rather than passively attendin...
author: Yan Wang, Qifan Zhang, Jiachen Yu, Tian Liang, Dongyang Ma, Xiang Hu, Zibo Lin, Chunyang Li, Zhichao Wang, Miao Peng, Nuo Chen, Jia Li, Yujiu Yang, Haitao Mi, Dong Yu
